commit_scope: Lift the inventory lineage grammar into its own native observation doorway. The BML front-door now exposes /api/_form/inventory-flow-observation behind X-Form-Observe, runs api_inventory_flow through the kernel, and reports handler timing, framebuffer events, JIT rows, and python_authority=false without asking Python to annotate the native surface.

local_validation.notes: Prompt guide and wellness passed. Shell syntax, verifier source-load, focused provenance tests, Rust release build, and diff check passed. Local native serve compiled deploy/front-door/api.bml and listed 39 native routes including GET /api/_form/inventory-flow-observation. Local observation curl returned HTTP 200, X-Form-Router: native-kernel, observed_handler=api_inventory_flow, observed_canary=true, status=200, handler_total_ms=1, framebuffer_event_rows=36, events_returned=20, jit_rows=55, native_observation.handler=api_inventory_flow_observe, and python_authority=false. The underlying inventory flow curl returned its native_observation with observable_route=/api/_form/inventory-flow-observation.

ci_validation.notes: Remote CI is pending until this branch is pushed and a PR is opened.

deploy_validation.notes: Public deploy verification now includes the native inventory observation route with X-Form-Observe.

phase_gate.notes: Local proof passed. Commit, push, PR, CI, merge, deploy, and public verification remain.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: A caller can now observe the native inventory lineage grammar through a native BML observation route instead of relying on Python-side annotation.
test_flows: GET /api/_form/inventory-flow-observation with X-Form-Observe routes to the BML front-door service.

The observation route invokes api_inventory_flow and reports observed_handler=api_inventory_flow, observed_canary=true, status=200, handler timing, framebuffer events, JIT rows, and python_authority=false.
GET /api/inventory/flow native responses now name observable_route=/api/_form/inventory-flow-observation and observation_header=X-Form-Observe.
deploy/hostinger/auto-deploy.sh and scripts/verify_web_api_deploy.sh both fail unless the native observation proof appears.

evidence_refs: deploy/front-door/api.bml adds observable_route and observation_header to inventory-flow-native-observation-json.
deploy/kernel-router/docker-compose.kernel-router.yml routes /api/_form/inventory-flow-observation to the BML service only when X-Form-Observe: 1 is present.
deploy/hostinger/auto-deploy.sh locally probes the BML observation route before declaring kernel-router canary proof.
scripts/verify_web_api_deploy.sh checks the public native observation route during deployment verification.
Local native curl proved X-Form-Router: native-kernel and native_observation.python_authority=false for the observation route.
